COURT SHALL CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE UPON SUBMISSION OF A NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES WITH AN ESTIMATED DATE FOR DISMISSAL. THE TRIAL SHALL REMAIN ON CALENDAR AT THIS TIME. PRETRIAL FILING DEADLINES ARE VACATED. JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63096398)
